authors.name: Gabriel García Márquez
authors.bio: Colombian novelist, short-story writer, screenwriter, and journalist. Winner of the Nobel Prize in Literature 1982. Known for the novel One Hundred Years of Solitude.

authors.name: Haruki Murakami
authors.bio: Japanese novelist, surrealist writer, known for Kafka on the Shore and Norwegian Wood.

authors.name: Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie
authors.bio: Nigerian author, wrote Half of a Yellow Sun and Purple Hibiscus.

authors.name: Kazuo Ishiguro
authors.bio: Nobel laureate British author, wrote The Remains of the Day and Never Let Me Go.

authors.name: Margaret Atwood
authors.bio: Canadian poet and novelist, best known for The Handmaid's Tale.

authors.name: Stephen King
authors.bio: Prolific American horror and suspense fiction writer.

authors.name: Zadie Smith
authors.bio: British contemporary novelist and essayist, wrote White Teeth.

authors.name: Toni Morrison
authors.bio: Nobel laureate African-American novelist, wrote Beloved.

authors.name: Elena Ferrante
authors.bio: Pseudonymous Italian novelist, known for the Neapolitan Novels.

authors.name: Salman Rushdie
authors.bio: British-Indian novelist, wrote Midnight's Children and The Satanic Verses.

authors.name: Elena Richardson
authors.bio: Contemporary tech and architectural fiction writer.

authors.name: Marcus Thorne
authors.bio: Mystery and thriller author, creator of the Sarah Cross detective series.

authors.name: Sarah Jenkins
authors.bio: Architect and urban planner writing on modern concrete developments.

authors.name: Dr. Alan Turing
authors.bio: Pioneer of computer science, writer on algorithms and computing machinery.

authors.name: Clara Voigt
authors.bio: German contemporary novelist writing about technology and society.

books.title: The Architect's Logic
books.description: An exploration into structural systems, combining computational models with classical architectural layouts.

books.title: Silent Patterns
books.description: A gripping mystery novel following detective Sarah Cross as she unravels cryptic disappearances in a quiet coastal town.

books.title: Urban Flow
books.description: A comprehensive look at circulation and transit systems in dense global cities.

books.title: Data Structures
books.description: A foundational text on binary trees, graph theory, and algorithmic complexity analysis.

books.title: Whisper of the Wind
books.description: A poetic narrative about a remote Alpine community adjusting to climate changes.

books.title: Neural Networks
books.description: Mathematical foundations of neural weights, backpropagation, and artificial learning systems.

books.title: The Last Meridian
books.description: An oceanographic thriller tracing a missing survey vessel in the South Pacific.

books.title: Concrete Dreams
books.description: The visual history of brutalist architecture and its social housing initiatives.

books.title: Shadows in Motion
books.description: Fast-paced corporate espionage thriller centering on industrial drone designs.

books.title: Beyond the Binary
books.description: Critical essays regarding the ethics and societal impacts of automation.
